title: Flow State
description: Identifies the behavioural conditions under which attention, energy, and progress most naturally organise into productive momentum.

context.domainDefinition: Flow State describes the conditions under which your attention, energy, and behaviour most naturally organise into productive momentum.
context.domainScope: This assessment identifies the behavioural route that most often helps you enter, sustain, and recover meaningful working flow.
context.interpretationGuidance: Read the result as a current behavioural pattern, not a fixed identity. The ranked signals show which routes you currently rely on most, which routes support them, and which routes may need more deliberate access.
context.introNote: Your result is generated from your response pattern across the assessment. It reflects the relative strength of four flow signals: Deep Focus, Creative Movement, Physical Rhythm, and Social Exchange.

signals.label: Deep Focus
signals.shortDefinition: Sustained attention, depth, and reduced distraction.

signals.label: Creative Movement
signals.shortDefinition: Idea movement, exploration, variation, and generative reframing.

signals.label: Physical Rhythm
signals.shortDefinition: Bodily routine, pacing, environment, and practical continuity.

signals.label: Social Exchange
signals.shortDefinition: Interaction, feedback, shared energy, and conversational momentum.
